instruction:
Compute the integral:
$$
\int \frac{ x^3 }{ \sqrt{4 \cdot x^2+4 \cdot x+5} } \, dx
$$

Options:
A. \left(\frac{1}{12}\cdot x^2-\frac{5}{48}\cdot x-\frac{5}{96}\right)\cdot\sqrt{4\cdot x^2+4\cdot x+5}+\frac{5}{16}\cdot\ln\left(x+\frac{1}{2}+\sqrt{1+\left(x+\frac{1}{2}\right)^2+3}\right)+C
B. \left(\frac{1}{12}\cdot x^2-\frac{5}{48}\cdot x-\frac{5}{96}\right)\cdot\sqrt{4\cdot x^2+4\cdot x+5}+\frac{5}{16}\cdot\ln\left(x+\frac{1}{2}+\sqrt{1+\left(x+\frac{1}{2}\right)^2-1}\right)+C
C. \left(\frac{1}{12}\cdot x^2-\frac{5}{48}\cdot x-\frac{5}{96}\right)\cdot\sqrt{4\cdot x^2+4\cdot x+5}+\frac{5}{16}\cdot\ln\left(x+\frac{1}{2}+\sqrt{1+\left(x+\frac{1}{2}\right)^2+1}\right)+C
D. \left(\frac{1}{12}\cdot x^2-\frac{5}{48}\cdot x-\frac{5}{96}\right)\cdot\sqrt{4\cdot x^2+4\cdot x+5}+\frac{5}{16}\cdot\ln\left(x+\frac{1}{2}+\sqrt{1+\left(x+\frac{1}{2}\right)^2+2}\right)+C
E. \left(\frac{1}{12}\cdot x^2-\frac{5}{48}\cdot x-\frac{5}{96}\right)\cdot\sqrt{4\cdot x^2+4\cdot x+5}+\frac{5}{16}\cdot\ln\left(x+\frac{1}{2}+\sqrt{1+\left(x+\frac{1}{2}\right)^2-2}\right)+C
F. \left(\frac{1}{12}\cdot x^2-\frac{5}{48}\cdot x-\frac{5}{96}\right)\cdot\sqrt{4\cdot x^2+4\cdot x+5}+\frac{5}{16}\cdot\ln\left(x+\frac{1}{2}+\sqrt{1+\left(x+\frac{1}{2}\right)^2+4}\right)+C
G. \left(\frac{1}{12}\cdot x^2-\frac{5}{48}\cdot x-\frac{5}{96}\right)\cdot\sqrt{4\cdot x^2+4\cdot x+5}+\frac{5}{16}\cdot\ln\left(x+\frac{1}{2}+\sqrt{1+\left(x+\frac{1}{2}\right)^2+5}\right)+C
H. \left(\frac{1}{12}\cdot x^2-\frac{5}{48}\cdot x-\frac{5}{96}\right)\cdot\sqrt{4\cdot x^2+4\cdot x+5}+\frac{5}{16}\cdot\ln\left(x+\frac{1}{2}+\sqrt{4\cdot x^2+4\cdot x+5}\right)+C
I. \left(\frac{1}{12}\cdot x^2-\frac{5}{48}\cdot x-\frac{5}{96}\right)\cdot\sqrt{4\cdot x^2+4\cdot x+5}+\frac{5}{16}\cdot\ln\left(x+\frac{1}{2}+\sqrt{1+\left(x+\frac{1}{2}\right)^2}\right)+C
J. \left(\frac{1}{12}\cdot x^2-\frac{5}{48}\cdot x-\frac{5}{96}\right)\cdot\sqrt{4\cdot x^2+4\cdot x+5}+\frac{5}{16}\cdot\ln\left(x+\frac{1}{2}+\sqrt{1+\left(x+\frac{1}{2}\right)^2-3}\right)+C
